cover.era_chip: 朝鮮 前期 · 書院·鄕約
cover.subtitle:
사림이 만든 학교,
사림이 세운 규약.
cover.imagePrompt: Joseon folk minhwa + genre-painting tones. Hanji beige, ink-black, crimson, navy. Scene: a hilltop seowon (Confucian academy) with curved tile roofs, wooden columns, and a small inner sadang (shrine) surrounded by old pine trees. In the foreground courtyard, two yangban scholars in white dopo and black gat are reading scrolls together. A stone monument stands to the side. Composition: serene, scholarly retreat. Color: hanji beige + ink-black + crimson signboard accent + soft pine green. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

timeline.text: 조광조, 여씨 향약 전국 보급 시도.

items.name: 조광조
items.desc: 여씨 향약 보급, 사림 개혁 추진.

items.name: 이이
items.desc: 해주 향약 제정, 향촌 자치 실천.

outro.tip_body: 심화에서는 향약 4대 강목(덕업상권·과실상규·예속상교·환난상휼)과 향약별 인물(조광조 여씨, 이황 예안, 이이 해주)을 묶어 외울 것.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized seowon gate silhouette with curved tile roof, and to the right a small folded paper scroll suggesting the hyangyak rules. Cream #F2EDE3 base + amber #B45309 accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.
